scenarios.name: Redesign confusing settings page
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applies the skill's explicit sidebar-group structure, auto-save toast or floating save bar pattern, changed-field highlighting, and per-field reset — baseline only mentions generic tabs and grouping.

scenarios.name: Build a button design system
scenarios.rationale: Treatment covers the skill's 4-variant hierarchy (Primary/Secondary/Ghost/Destructive), three sizes with exact heights, all required states including scale 0.98 active and 2px focus ring, plus icon-only and verb+noun rules — baseline lists variants and states generically.
